idea-plugin.name: Copy Path for Claude Code
idea-plugin.description:
Copy Path for Claude Code

Copy file and folder path references in the Claude Code @-mention format directly from your IDE. Paste them into Claude Code conversations so Claude can instantly locate the exact file and lines you're referring to.

Features

  • Copy file or folder references in @path/to/file#Lx-y format
  • Smart line detection based on editor text selection
  • Multi-file selection support — select multiple files/folders and copy all paths at once
  • Works from editor context menu, project tree context menu, and keyboard shortcut
  • Configurable balloon notification with adjustable duration
  • Compatible with all JetBrains IDEs

Reference Format

ContextOutput
File (no selection)@src/utils/auth.ts
File (single line selected)@src/utils/auth.ts#L42
File (multiple lines selected)@src/utils/auth.ts#L42-68
Folder@src/components
Multiple files selected@src/Button.tsx @src/Input.tsx

How to Use

  • Editor context menu — Right-click in any editor → Copy Path for Claude Code. The reference includes line numbers based on your current text selection.
  • Project tree context menu — Right-click any file or folder in the Project tool window → Copy Path for Claude Code. Copies the relative path without line numbers.
  • Keyboard shortcut — Press Alt+C (⌥C on macOS). Works in both the editor and project tree; the output adapts automatically based on focus and selection.

Examples

  1. Select lines 10–25 in src/components/Button.tsx, press ⌥C → @src/components/Button.tsx#L10-25
  2. Right-click package.json in the project tree → @package.json
  3. Right-click src/components folder → @src/components
  4. Place caret without selecting text, press ⌥C → @src/index.ts (path only)

Settings

Settings → Tools → Copy Path for Claude Code

  • Show notification after copy — Toggle balloon notification on/off (default: enabled)
  • Notification duration — How long the notification stays visible, 1–30 seconds (default: 3s)

Compatibility

Works with all JetBrains IDEs (2024.1+): IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, PhpStorm, Rider, CLion, RustRover, DataGrip, Android Studio, and more.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Copy file and folder path in @path#Lstart-end format for Claude Code
  • Editor context menu, project tree context menu, and Alt+C keyboard shortcut
  • Configurable balloon notification with adjustable duration
  • Settings page under Tools → Copy Path for Claude Code
  • Compatible with all JetBrains IDEs (2024.1+)

action.description: Copy file path in @path#Lx-y format for Claude Code
